panels.title: Error Logs

queries.query: SELECT count(_timestamp) AS value FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%'

panels.title: Namespaces

queries.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT kubernetes_namespace_name) AS value FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Pods

queries.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT kubernetes_pod_name) AS value FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Logs Over Time

queries.query: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS bucket, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_apps" GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

panels.title: Top Namespaces

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_namespace_name AS namespace, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY namespace ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Pods By Logs

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_pod_name AS pod, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pod ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Apps (label)

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_labels_app AS app, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE kubernetes_labels_app IS NOT NULL GROUP BY app ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Total logs
Top 5xx Paths

queries.query: SELECT path AS route, count(status) AS errors FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE status >= 500 AND path IS NOT NULL GROUP BY route ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Containers by Errors

queries.query:
SELECT
  concat(kubernetes_namespace_name, ' / ', kubernetes_pod_name, ' / ', kubernetes_container_name) AS target,
  count(_timestamp) AS errors
FROM "k8s_apps"
WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name IS NOT NULL
  AND kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL
  AND kubernetes_container_name IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error'
    OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%'
    OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%'
    OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%'
    OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%'
    OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%'
    OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%'
    OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%'
    OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%'
    OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%'
  )
GROUP BY target
ORDER BY errors DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Errors Over Time

queries.query: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS bucket, count(_timestamp) AS errors FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

panels.title: Latest Errors

queries.query: SELECT _timestamp, kubernetes_namespace_name, kubernetes_pod_name, kubernetes_container_name, coalesce(message, msg, log) AS error_message FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: HTTP Status Distribution

queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN status >= 500 THEN '5xx' WHEN status >= 400 THEN '4xx' WHEN status >= 300 THEN '3xx' WHEN status >= 200 THEN '2xx' ELSE 'other' END AS status_group, count(status) AS total FROM "k8s_apps" WHERE status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status_group ORDER BY total ASC
